programmes.show_description: Popcorn at the ready, these are the biggest songs from the movies. But don't forget to switch off your mobile phone!
The standout chart music that defined the decade - from Britpop, Boybands & R&B to the birth of electronic dance beats!
60 minutes of hits & headlines from the year that 'Prime Suspect' & 'The Fresh Prince of Bel Air' debuted on TV, and Ed Sheeran was born in Halifax!
1993 gave us the milestone 25th release in the NOW series. Here are all 34 videos from CD1 & CD2, back to back & in order! Expect Freddie, Kim & a bit of REM!
The standout chart music that defined the decade - from Britpop, Boybands & R&B to the birth of electronic dance beats!

programmes.show_name: It Was Number 1 For How Long?
programmes.show_description: Back in the 90s some songs hit the top spot and stayed there. In some cases for a very long time! Each of these acts were number 1 for at least 3 weeks, but who holds record?
Starting in 2005, all top 10 hits, 20 of Rihanna's biggest anthems & killer collaborations featuring David Guetta, Eminem, Jay Z, Calvin Harris & even Paul McCartney!
Dim the lights, set the mood and get ready for the passion, heartbreak & timeless romance of the 2000s. Anthems for a generation that continue to resonate today.
Pat fires Cupid's arrow at 30 hits that made us madly in love! With uplifting dance bangers, cool RnB and perfect pop moments that are truly timeless.
Dim the lights, set the mood and get ready for the passion, heartbreak & timeless romance of the 2000s. Anthems for a generation that continue to resonate today.
Two artists come together to perform unforgettable songs about love, passion, loss & longing - but it's not all slushy ballads! With Whitney, Robbie, Cheryl Cole, Troy & Gabriella.
Starting in 1990, two hours of powerhouse ballads, legendary love songs & pure emotion that can only be delivered by a musical queen. This is the incredible Mariah Carey!
Kick back and relax with some mellow moments. Chilled to perfection.
The A1 boys take you back to glory days of Take That, New Kids, 5ive, Spice Girls, Boyzone, Eternal & more where '90s stars dominated all the best magazine polls!
Every track a smash hit in the 90s or 00s, every video a UK chart number one. What more could you possibly need in life?
Kick back and relax with some mellow moments. Chilled to perfection.
Have you ever wondered what the 30 biggest selling love songs of the 90s were? Wonder no more. It's time to get it on!
Every track a smash hit, every video a UK chart number one in the 00s. What more could you possibly need in life!

programmes.show_name: Jenny Powell: Such A Good Feeling!
programmes.show_description: Dancing through history - one anthem at a time! From late 80s optimism to mid 90s euphoria, it's where house, rave & eurodance all started. Hands in the air people!
Dust off your flip phones and get ready to dance the day away with the ultimate collection of hits that'll transport you back to those unforgettable millenium parties!
Amazing songs, nonsense titles. So, Get UR Freak On while you are Chasing Pavements on your JCB!
There's nothing quite like a cheesy good party... Unless its a 90s cheesy party that is!! These are the greatest party anthems from the 90s. Fact!
Loud shirts, foam mallet & 25 huge videos of the decade are ready to go as Timmy Mallett brings us his Utterly Brilliant party!
From little monsters to global chart domination! Starting back in 2009, we celebrate the iconic music & artistry from the awesome 'Haus of Gaga'!
4 hours of slammin' pop & rock hits crossing 2 decades - 1 belter from the 90s followed by another from the 00s. Simple!
Kick back and relax with some mellow moments. Chilled to perfection.
